历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11097 → 11950 → 12860 → 16203 → 15422, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4300 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15422, a slight recovery from 2024; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 27, 30, 30, 30, and 33 respectively, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan is 37, an expansion of 4 students (+12.1%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th in 2026, with rankings stable in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national normal universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management or response incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, rated as average, with stable attention; no record of enrollment gaps; Psychology is A+, Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, Sports Science is A-, with Psychology being top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors continue to be socially popular; teacher/education majors are polarized and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, with some cross-provincial appeal to Hunan examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5%–3.5%, a medium level for out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the 12.1% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 easing competition, the 8.4% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, stable school reputation, and continued popularity of science and engineering majors, and taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the increased examinee pool, a slight upward adjustment of 50 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16593, with a range of 16093–17093.
